problem id: 24a68f61
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11010011 -> 10011101
  11010100 -> 10100101
  10001000 -> 01000110
  10000010 -> 00010110
  01110110 -> 10110010
  10011001 -> 11001110
  00110000 -> 10000001
  01111010 -> 11010010
  10111010 -> 11010111
  11110010 -> 10010100

query: 00110010
predicted answer: 10010001
